alerts.title: ₹48,762 spent at Croma in 3 transactions
alerts.description: Croma is your top merchant this month with ₹48,762.28 across just 3 transactions, making it a significant one-time or short-burst expense. If any items are unused or returnable, this is worth reviewing.

alerts.title: Health & Fitness up 7.9% — Apollo Pharmacy at ₹10,975
alerts.description: Health & Fitness rose to ₹20,989.98 this month from ₹19,455.16 last month, with Apollo Pharmacy accounting for ₹10,974.38 across 10 visits and MedPlus adding another ₹5,040.78 across 6 visits. Combined pharmacy spend of ₹16,015 warrants checking for duplicate purchases or switching to a single pharmacy for bulk discounts.

alerts.title: Dual food subscriptions: Zomato (₹4,395) + active Swiggy spend (₹7,539)
alerts.description: You are paying ₹4,395.15/month for a Zomato subscription while also spending ₹7,538.62 on Swiggy (15 transactions) this month. Consolidating all food delivery to one platform could eliminate the subscription fee on the lesser-used service.

alerts.title: INOX monthly subscription at ₹3,694 vs. BookMyShow spend of ₹4,636
alerts.description: You are paying ₹3,694.19/month for an INOX subscription but also spending ₹4,636.37 at BookMyShow across 6 transactions, suggesting split cinema habits. If BookMyShow is your preferred platform, cancelling the INOX subscription could save ₹3,694 monthly.

tips: Consolidate your pharmacy purchases: you spent ₹10,974 at Apollo Pharmacy (10 visits) and ₹5,040 at MedPlus (6 visits) this month — pick one pharmacy and ask for a regular-customer discount or use Apollo's subscription plan to save an estimated 10–15% on recurring medicines.

Your ATM withdrawals totalled ₹47,000 across 7 transactions this month — switching to UPI or card payments would eliminate ATM fees (typically ₹20–21 per transaction beyond free limits) and make spending trackable by category instead of landing in 'Others'.

Shopping at ₹1,35,546 is your largest category and still 14% above the 3-month average of ₹1,57,054 — Amazon (₹35,592, 10 orders) and Flipkart (₹18,207, 6 orders) together account for ₹53,800; enable 'Save for Later' for non-urgent items and wait for sale events to reduce impulse purchases.

You are spending ₹9,793.15/month on LinkedIn Premium (₹1,699) and ChatGPT Plus (₹1,699) plus an INOX subscription (₹3,694) — review whether LinkedIn Premium is delivering active value (job searches, InMail usage); downgrading to a free plan saves ₹1,699/month instantly.

Your Food & Dining spend of ₹27,256 this month included ₹7,538 on Swiggy (15 orders, avg ₹502/order) and a ₹4,395 Zomato subscription — setting a weekly Swiggy budget of ₹1,500 and batch-ordering rather than ordering daily could cut this category by ₹4,000–5,000/month.
